description: Canonical skill activation triggers. Tuned 2026-04-24: narrowed keywords to reduce false positives during planning/discussion turns. Goal is high-precision triggers for explicit implementation requests, not broad pattern-matching.

frontend-design.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

context-layer.description: Use impact_check before editing public APIs, brain_search for prior lessons. Triggers only on explicit refactor/rename/delete or impact-check requests.

promptTriggers.proactiveHint: About to refactor/rename/delete? Run impact_check first to find downstream consumers.

evolve.description: Self-evolution analysis - aggregates lessons across sessions and proposes harness improvements. Closes the feedback loop.
evolve.action: Use the /evolve slash command (type it directly), NOT the Skill tool.

freview.description: Final review - spawn completeness and code review agents against current session. Slash command, not Skill tool.
freview.action: Use the /freview slash command (type it directly), NOT the Skill tool.

tuning_history.2026-04-24: Narrowed all triggers. Dropped broad keywords (edit/modify/change/update/design/UI/explore/investigate/understand) that matched planning conversations. Added excludePatterns for 'plan' and 'mockup'. Goal: trigger only on explicit imperative implementation requests.

enforcement_types.suggest: Skill suggestion appears but doesn't block execution
enforcement_types.block: Requires skill to be used before proceeding (guardrail)

priority_levels.low: Optional - Trigger only for explicit matches

skill_types.domain: Standard skill invoked via the Skill tool
skill_types.proactive: Skill that provides proactive hints and MCP tool suggestions
skill_types.slash-command: Slash command invoked directly (e.g., /freview), NOT via the Skill tool
